summary: Completed comprehensive frontend testing of TradeLife premium login page. All 13 specified features tested successfully with no issues found.
passed_tests: Dark radial overlay is present and functional
TradeLife branding text visible (title: 'TradeLife', subtitle: 'Built for trades')
Glass panel overlay with backdrop blur effect working
Email input field accepts user input correctly
Password input field accepts user input correctly
Forgot password link is visible and styled
Sign in button with blue gradient is visible and clickable
OR divider is present and styled correctly
Continue with Google button is visible and clickable
Sign up footer text is present with proper styling
No console errors or error elements found on page
Visual verification shows premium SaaS appearance
